requirements.visa_free: No visa needed. Entry is permitted freely.
requirements.visa_on_arrival: Visa can be obtained upon arrival. No prior embassy visit needed.
requirements.eta: Electronic Travel Authorisation required. Applied online before travel.
requirements.e_visa: Electronic visa required. Must be obtained online before travel.
requirements.visa_required: A visa must be obtained from an embassy/consulate before travel.
requirements.no_admission: Entry not permitted or passport not recognized.
requirements.unknown: Requirement unknown. Check official government sources.
